original_image_tags: A carbon copy of a typewritten document on thin, translucent paper. The text appears in mirror-image, indicating it was likely written on the back of another page or is a reverse copy. The stamp "SECRET" is crossed out in red ink at the top and bottom of the page.

elements.description: Faint, blurry typed text covering the page, primarily black or dark ink. A red 'SECRET' stamp is visible at the top center, crossed out with a black line. Another red 'SECRET' stamp is visible at the bottom center, also crossed out with a black line. Three hole-punch holes are visible along the bottom edge.

judge.reason: Description A states the text appears in mirror-image, while Description B describes normal-reading typed text, a direct contradiction on the visual presentation of the document.
